mapper.sql: srId, userId, activity, teamClassCount, privateClassCount, sportType, oxyKcal, unoxyKcal, teamClassKcal, privateClassKcal, startDate, sportTime, sportStep, energy, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into sport_record (srId, userId, activity, teamClassCount, privateClassCount, sportType, oxyKcal, unoxyKcal, teamClassKcal, privateClassKcal, startDate, sportTime, sportStep, energy, createdDate ) values (#{srId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{activity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{teamClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{privateClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sportType,jdbcType=BIT}, #{oxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unoxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{teamClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{privateClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sportTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sportStep,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{energy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into sport_record
srId,
userId,
activity,
teamClassCount,
privateClassCount,
sportType,
oxyKcal,
unoxyKcal,
teamClassKcal,
privateClassKcal,
startDate,
sportTime,
sportStep,
energy,
createdDate,
#{srId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{activity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{teamClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{privateClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sportType,jdbcType=BIT},
#{oxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{unoxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{teamClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{privateClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{startDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sportTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sportStep,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{energy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update sport_record
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
activity = #{activity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
teamClassCount = #{teamClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
privateClassCount = #{privateClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sportType = #{sportType,jdbcType=BIT},
oxyKcal = #{oxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
unoxyKcal = #{unoxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
teamClassKcal = #{teamClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
privateClassKcal = #{privateClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
startDate = #{startDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sportTime = #{sportTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sportStep = #{sportStep,jdbcType=INTEGER},
energy = #{energy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where srId = #{srId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sport_record set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, activity = #{activity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, teamClassCount = #{teamClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, privateClassCount = #{privateClassCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sportType = #{sportType,jdbcType=BIT}, oxyKcal = #{oxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, unoxyKcal = #{unoxyKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, teamClassKcal = #{teamClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, privateClassKcal = #{privateClassKcal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, startDate = #{startDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sportTime = #{sportTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sportStep = #{sportStep,jdbcType=INTEGER}, energy = #{energy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where srId = #{srId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select srId, userId, activity, teamClassCount, privateClassCount, teamClassKcal, privateClassKcal, createdDate from sport_record where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT userId,sportType,SUM(oxyKcal) oxyKcal,SUM(unoxyKcal) unoxyKcal,SUM(sportStep) sportStep, SUM(distance) distance,(SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(`sportTime`)))) sportTime, SUM(energy) energy FROM sport_active WHERE userId= #{userId} AND sportType = #{sportType} AND date_format(createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT COUNT(1) cishu,SUM(oxyKcal) oxyKcal,SUM(unoxyKcal) unoxyKcal,SUM(sportStep) sportStep,SUM(distance) distance,(SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(`sportTime`)))) sportTime,SUM(energy) energy, (SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(`sportTime`))) sportTime FROM sport_active WHERE userId=#{userId} AND sportType=#{sportType} AND YEARWEEK(date_format(createdDate,'%Y-%m-%d')) = YEARWEEK(now())) sumST, (select date_format(createdDate ,'%Y-%m-%d' ) ) `data` FROM sport_active WHERE YEARWEEK(date_format(createdDate,'%Y-%m-%d'),1) = YEARWEEK(now(),1) AND userId= #{userId} AND sportType = #{sportType} GROUP BY `data` order by createdDate desc

SELECT COUNT(1) cishu,SUM(oxyKcal) oxyKcal,SUM(unoxyKcal) unoxyKcal,SUM(sportStep) sportStep,SUM(distance) distance,(SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(`sportTime`)))) sportTime,SUM(energy) energy,createdDate,
(SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(`sportTime`))) sportTime FROM sport_active WHERE DATE_FORMAT( createdDate, '%Y%m' ) = DATE_FORMAT( CURDATE( ) , '%Y%m' ) AND userId= #{userId} AND sportType = #{sportType}) sumST, (select date_format(createdDate ,'%Y-%m-%d' ) ) `data` FROM sport_active WHERE DATE_FORMAT( createdDate, '%Y%m' ) = DATE_FORMAT( CURDATE( ) , '%Y%m' ) AND userId= #{userId} AND sportType = #{sportType} GROUP BY data order by createdDate desc

SELECT COUNT(1) cishu,SUM(oxyKcal) oxyKcal,SUM(unoxyKcal) unoxyKcal,SUM(sportStep) sportStep,SUM(distance) distance,(SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(`sportTime`)))) sportTime,SUM(energy) energy, (SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(`sportTime`))) sportTime FROM sport_active WHERE (select date_format(createdDate ,'%Y' ) ) = (select YEAR(CURDATE())) AND userId= #{userId} AND sportType = #{sportType}) sumST, (select date_format(createdDate ,'%Y-%m' ) ) `data` FROM sport_active WHERE (select date_format(createdDate ,'%Y' ) ) = (select YEAR(CURDATE())) AND userId= #{userId} AND sportType = #{sportType} GROUP BY data order by createdDate desc

select ROUND(sum(ifnull(sr.teamClassKcal,0)+ ifnull(sr.privateClassKcal,0)+ ifnull((select sum(ifnull(sa.energy,0)) from sport_active sa where sa.userId=#{userId}),0)+ ifnull((select sum(ifnull(usdr.calorie,0)) from user_sport_device_record usdr where usdr.userId=#{userId}),0)),0) from sport_record sr where sr.userId = #{userId}
mapper.update: update sport_record set activity = activity + 1, createdDate = now() where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and date_format(createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d') <> date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
mapper.select: select sum(kcal) kcal,userId from (select teamClassKcal+privateClassKcal kcal,userId,createdDate FROM sport_record where DATE_SUB(now(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(createdDate) UNION ALL select calorie,userId,createTime FROM user_sport_device_record where DATE_SUB(now(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(createTime) ) a GROUP BY userId
SELECT ifnull(SUM(energy),0) FROM sport_active WHERE userId=#{userId} AND sportType=5 AND date_format(createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
SELECT ifnull(SUM(energy),0) FROM sport_active WHERE userId=#{userId} AND sportType=6 AND date_format(createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
